title: Wire feature_overrides.add into the audit meta feature matrix (currently declarative-only)
source: Verified by hackathon-pm 2026-05-29 (grep + read of run_proposal.py/run_xau_d1.py). Originated in the B0046 brainstorm session; durable finding in ~/.claude memory project_feature_overrides_not_wired.md.
why: proposal.feature_overrides.add is consumed ONLY by phase5/lookahead_lint.py (validation) and the phase5/proposal.py dataclass — it is NEVER applied to the audit's meta training matrix. scripts/run_xau_d1.py and phase5/run_proposal.py train the meta on a fixed build_tier2_features(...); the only wired feature lever is primary_feature_blacklist (drop-only). Consequence: the regime-conditional feature-selection thesis the hypothesizer proposes is never actually tested in M3 audits, and B0046's marginal-lift ablation has nothing to ablate. NOT subsumed by B0068, which enriches the DOSSIER (hypothesizer input via build_dossier_features), a different matrix than the audit meta-training matrix.
value_rationale: High: this is the hard prerequisite for B0046, and without it the entire regime-conditional added-feature mechanism is a silent no-op in the audit that the whole Loop A program assumes is being validated.
scope: Inject proposal.feature_overrides.add into the meta training matrix in the audit path (run_xau_d1 / run_proposal via pipeline/features.py), symmetric to how primary_feature_blacklist drops columns today.
Ensure added features are computable/available (or skipped with a recorded reason) and respect the lookahead/PIT invariants (FRED .shift(1), closed-bar only).
B0046 ablation arm then drops exactly these added features via primary_feature_blacklist to measure marginal lift (gated vs ungated).
Tests: an audit with non-empty feature_overrides.add actually changes the meta feature columns.
recommendation: Implement before B0046. Coordinate with the phase5-regime-methodology spec and the run_proposal audit harness.

history.reason: registered by hackathon-pm: feature_overrides.add audit-wiring prerequisite for B0046
chore(backlog): quiesce cross-session reconciliation + B0079 prereq + B0068 done

Implemented: (1) run_proposal.py passes feature_overrides_add/drop to transient config. (2) run_xau_d1._run_one_primary applies fo_drop (deduped with primary_feature_blacklist) to meta X matrix and validates fo_add against available tier2 columns, writing feature_overrides_status.json to output_dir. (3) parse_pipeline_results reads the status file back; _persist_record surfaces it in the audit artifact. Now the DA can see evidence: rv_20 -> present, volume -> not_in_tier2_skipped. 10 new tests. 1141 total pass.
